 {'date': '2026-02-16 04:05:00',
  'headline': 'Ras Al Khaimah for White Cement & Construction Materials P.S.C '

  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',

 {'date': '2026-02-13 09:05:22',
  'headline': 'Middle Eastern Penny Stocks To Watch With Market Caps Over '

  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',

 {'date': '2026-02-13 04:05:40',
  'headline': 'Middle Eastern Penny Stocks: 3 Picks With Market Caps Under '
              'US$2B',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'The Middle Eastern stock markets have recently shown resilience, '
             'with most Gulf bourses gaining on upbeat earnings and easing '

 {'date': '2026-02-11 04:04:52',
  'headline': 'ADNH Catering And Two Other Middle Eastern Penny Stocks To '

  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'The Middle Eastern stock markets have recently seen gains, '
             'driven by strong corporate earnings, despite mixed performances '

  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/adnh-catering-two-other-middle-040452740.html'},
 {'date': '2026-02-10 04:05:23',
  'headline': 'Middle Eastern Penny Stocks To Watch In February 2026',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'As tensions ease following positive US-Iran talks, most Gulf '

  'headline': 'Middle Eastern Market Movers: Gulf Pharmaceutical Industries '

  'summary': 'The Middle Eastern markets have been experiencing a slight '
